phase: Home base block · Jul 6–24 · full gym

todos.text: Morning sunlight ~10 min, same wake time
Carbs around the session — fuel the springs
Wind down: screens off 30 min before bed

note: You're home with a full gym and 3 clean weeks before Spain. This block builds the elastic base — tendons, deep-range legs, speed. Do the check-in below each morning; it decides how hard today's session should be. Plyo/speed days need you fresh, so on a red morning swap them for the recovery day.
